title: The Investigation: A Haunting in Sherwood
original_title: The Investigation: A Haunting in Sherwood
overview: Private Investigator Gareth Morris went missing in 2018 whilst investigating noises coming from a house in Sherwood. He hacked into the home's security system and recorded everything.
